entries.hypothesis: Add concern-ranking synthesis step before questioning — rank top 3 concerns before first question to lead interrogation with highest-impact issues
entries.notes: 3-3 on positive cases, 4 draws on negatives. Step 4 concern-ranking instruction did not reliably change first-question behavior — models still opened with context-gathering questions. Champion was sharper on challenge-forward cases (poke-holes, challenge-my-thinking, uncertain-feature). eval_quality below 0.6 floor.

entries.hypothesis: Prohibit context-gathering openers — step 4 rule: open with challenge not clarification
entries.notes: 3-2 on positive cases (up from 3-3 in iter 1), but eval_quality still below 0.6 floor. Step 4 worked on poke-holes and is-this-good-idea (more forceful challenge) but not on uncertain-feature or challenge-my-thinking (model rationalized context as prerequisite to challenge). Improvement was directional but insufficient.
